docs.title: Productive K3S Addons
docs.text: Public documentation for Productive K3S add-on and stack source packages.

docs.title: Productive K3S Addons
docs.text: productive-k3s-addons is the public source repository for Kubernetes add-ons and stacks consumed by productive-k3s-core.

docs.title: Developer docs
docs.text: These pages describe the source contract, repository layout, and cross-testing model for public add-ons and stacks.

docs.title: Project layout
docs.text:
The repository structure is:

productive-k3s-addons/
├── addons/
├── stacks/
├── scripts/
├── tests/
└── docs/

Each publishable add-on source must provide:

  • addon.yaml
  • scripts/configure.sh
  • scripts/install.sh
  • scripts/validate.sh
  • scripts/clean.sh
  • scripts/backup.sh

Each publishable stack source must provide:

  • stack.yaml

Add-on metadata now also declares impact in advance:

  • whether it changes cluster state
  • whether it changes host-local state
  • which host-local capabilities it may use

docs.title: Testing and matrix
docs.text:
productive-k3s-addons validates content against a selected productive-k3s-core engine.

Default CI scope:

  • static
  • contract

Manual validation scope:

  • live

Typical commands:

make test-all PRODUCTIVE_K3S_CORE_REPO_DIR=/path/to/productive-k3s-core
make test-matrix PRODUCTIVE_K3S_CORE_REPO_DIR=/path/to/productive-k3s-core
make test-live-matrix PRODUCTIVE_K3S_CORE_REPO_DIR=/path/to/productive-k3s-core
make -C tests test-static ADDON=nginx PRODUCTIVE_K3S_CORE_REPO_DIR=/path/to/productive-k3s-core
make -C tests test-contract STACK=base PRODUCTIVE_K3S_CORE_REPO_DIR=/path/to/productive-k3s-core
make -C tests test-live ADDON=nginx KUBECONFIG=~/.kube/config

Meaning:

  • test-all: local non-live checks only (validate-layout + test-static + test-contract)
  • test-live: live validation for one selected add-on or stack
  • test-live-matrix: live validation across every discovered add-on and stack

docs.title: Product
docs.text:
This repository owns source content, not the runtime engine.

  • productive-k3s-core installs and validates packages
  • productive-k3s-addons defines public add-ons and stacks
  • productive-k3s-addons-pro mirrors the same contract for private/commercial content

docs.title: Relationship with Core and Addons Pro
docs.text:
productive-k3s-core is the engine. It discovers add-on metadata, resolves stack membership, and executes normalized hooks.

productive-k3s-addons contains:

  • addons/: individually deployable capabilities
  • stacks/: declarative collections of add-ons

productive-k3s-addons-pro follows the same repository contract for private content.

docs.title: User docs
docs.text: This site mainly documents source authoring and repository-level validation. End users normally consume packaged artifacts through pk3s and productive-k3s-core.

docs.title: Make targets
docs.text:
Repository-level commands:

make test-all
make test-matrix
make test-live-matrix

Detailed test targets live under tests/:

make -C tests validate-layout
make -C tests test-static ADDON=<name>
make -C tests test-contract ADDON=<name>
make -C tests test-live ADDON=<name> KUBECONFIG=~/.kube/config

make test-all is the local non-live entrypoint and runs:

  • validate-layout
  • test-static
  • test-contract

For coordinated work with an unreleased Core checkout:

make test-all PRODUCTIVE_K3S_CORE_REPO_DIR=/path/to/productive-k3s-core

docs.title: Productive K3S Addons
docs.text: productive-k3s-addons es el repositorio público de código fuente para add-ons y stacks consumidos por productive-k3s-core.

docs.title: Documentación para desarrolladores
docs.text: Estas páginas describen el contrato fuente, la organización del repositorio y el modelo de testing cruzado para add-ons y stacks públicos.

docs.title: Organización del proyecto
docs.text:
La estructura es:

productive-k3s-addons/
├── addons/
├── stacks/
├── scripts/
├── tests/
└── docs/

Cada add-on publicable debe incluir:

  • addon.yaml
  • scripts/configure.sh
  • scripts/install.sh
  • scripts/validate.sh
  • scripts/clean.sh
  • scripts/backup.sh

Cada stack publicable debe incluir:

  • stack.yaml

La metadata del add-on ahora también declara impacto de antemano:

  • si cambia el estado del cluster
  • si cambia el estado local del host
  • qué capacidades host-locales puede usar

docs.title: Tests y matriz
docs.text:
productive-k3s-addons valida contenido contra una versión elegida de productive-k3s-core.

Alcance default de CI:

  • static
  • contract

Alcance manual:

  • live

Comandos típicos:

make test-all PRODUCTIVE_K3S_CORE_REPO_DIR=/ruta/a/productive-k3s-core
make test-matrix PRODUCTIVE_K3S_CORE_REPO_DIR=/ruta/a/productive-k3s-core
make test-live-matrix PRODUCTIVE_K3S_CORE_REPO_DIR=/ruta/a/productive-k3s-core
make -C tests test-static ADDON=nginx PRODUCTIVE_K3S_CORE_REPO_DIR=/ruta/a/productive-k3s-core
make -C tests test-contract STACK=base PRODUCTIVE_K3S_CORE_REPO_DIR=/ruta/a/productive-k3s-core
make -C tests test-live ADDON=nginx KUBECONFIG=~/.kube/config

docs.title: Producto
docs.text:
Este repositorio contiene contenido fuente, no el engine de ejecución.

  • productive-k3s-core instala y valida paquetes
  • productive-k3s-addons define add-ons y stacks públicos
  • productive-k3s-addons-pro replica el mismo contrato para contenido privado/comercial

docs.title: Relación con Core y Addons Pro
docs.text:
productive-k3s-core es el engine. Descubre metadata de add-ons, resuelve la pertenencia a stacks y ejecuta hooks normalizados.

productive-k3s-addons contiene:

  • addons/: capacidades desplegables individualmente
  • stacks/: colecciones declarativas de add-ons

productive-k3s-addons-pro sigue el mismo contrato de repositorio para contenido privado.

docs.title: Documentación para usuarios
docs.text: Este sitio documenta principalmente el authoring fuente y la validación a nivel repositorio. Los usuarios finales consumen artefactos empaquetados vía pk3s y productive-k3s-core.

docs.title: Targets de Make
docs.text:
Comandos de validación a nivel repositorio:

make test-all
make test-matrix
make test-live-matrix

Los targets detallados de test viven en tests/:

make -C tests validate-layout
make -C tests test-static ADDON=<name>
make -C tests test-contract ADDON=<name>
make -C tests test-live ADDON=<name> KUBECONFIG=~/.kube/config

Para trabajo coordinado con un checkout no publicado de Core:

make test-matrix PRODUCTIVE_K3S_CORE_REPO_DIR=/ruta/a/productive-k3s-core
